memory.title: Memory
memory.description: Configure the beginner-friendly memory features exposed by GeeClaw.

dreaming.title: Dreaming
dreaming.description: Organizes recent memory in the background and helps keep more important information.

activeMemory.title: Active Memory
activeMemory.description: Searches relevant memory before generating a reply.
activeMemory.modelDescription: Prefer a small, low-latency, lower-cost model for memory lookup and organization.

losslessClaw.title: Lossless Claw
losslessClaw.description: Keeps more context available in long-running conversations.
losslessClaw.modelDescription: Prefer a stable, lower-cost model for long-conversation summarization.

dreaming.unavailable: This feature is not available right now.

activeMemory.enabled: Relevant memory is checked before replies.
activeMemory.disabled: Replies are generated without active memory lookup.
activeMemory.unavailable: This feature cannot be configured right now.

losslessClaw.enabled: Long conversations keep more context available.
losslessClaw.disabled: Standard context management is being used.
losslessClaw.unavailable: Installed plugin version does not match GeeClaw requirements.
losslessClaw.installingHint: First-time installation can take more than 10 minutes. Keep GeeClaw running.

webSearch.title: Web Search
webSearch.description: Set up web search for your agent.

shared.autoUnavailable: No search service is ready yet. Add an API key first.

auto.title: Choose Automatically
auto.description: If you do not specify one, we will use any search service that is ready.

provider.envFallback: Leave blank to use env vars: {{envVars}}

environment.title: Environment Variables
environment.description: Manage the global environment variables injected into GeeClaw-managed runtimes.

runtime.title: Global Injection
runtime.description: These variables are injected into GeeClaw-managed Gateway and Agent runtimes and are also used for dependency checks.
runtime.restartHint: Saving automatically restarts the Gateway so changes take effect.

list.empty: No environment variables have been configured yet.

validation.title: Fix these issues before saving:
validation.empty: Row {{row}} is blank. Fill in both fields or remove it.
validation.incomplete: Row {{row}} must include both a variable name and a value.
validation.duplicate: Variable name {{key}} is duplicated. Keep only one entry.

cliMarketplace.title: CLI Market
cliMarketplace.description: Curated command-line tools to extend the capabilities of GeeClaw
cliMarketplace.loadFailed: Failed to load the CLI market
cliMarketplace.empty: No CLI tools are available here yet

safety.title: Safety
safety.description: Manage tool restrictions and approval behavior for the managed OpenClaw runtime.

toolPermission.title: Tool Permission
toolPermission.description: Choose which tool capabilities are available to the agent runtime.

default.title: Default
default.description: Allow common assistant actions while blocking automation and control-oriented capabilities.

strict.title: Strict
strict.description: Allow only low-risk querying and conversation. Command execution and file access stay disabled.

full.title: Full
full.description: Do not apply extra tool-deny restrictions. Use this only if you understand the risk.

approvalPolicy.title: Approval Policy
approvalPolicy.description: Choose when commands need manual confirmation before they run.

allowlist.title: allow-list
allowlist.description: Only commands that match approved safety rules run directly. Everything else requires manual confirmation.

full.title: Unrestricted
full.description: All commands are allowed by default without manual approval.

colorTheme.title: Color Theme
colorTheme.standardDesc: Default neutral colors for everyday use
colorTheme.inkDesc: Classic deep green with warm beige

aiProviders.title: AI Providers
aiProviders.description: Configure your AI model providers and API keys

overview.title: Provider Accounts
overview.description: A summary of the provider accounts and models currently configured.

modalities.title: Supported modalities
modalities.imageHint: Turn this on only if the model supports image understanding

empty.title: No providers configured
empty.desc: Add an AI provider to start using GeeClaw

inactive.title: This provider is not enabled yet

dialog.title: Add AI Provider
dialog.desc: Configure a new AI model provider
dialog.providerIdHelp: Used for config refs and written as {{value}}. Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only. This cannot be changed after creation.
dialog.apiKeyConfigured: An API key is already stored for this provider.
dialog.apiKeyMissing: No API key is stored for this provider yet.
dialog.apiKeyStored: Your API key is stored locally on your machine.
dialog.replaceApiKeyHelp: Leave this field empty if you want to keep the currently stored API key.
dialog.codePlanPresetDesc: Code Plan uses {{baseUrl}}. Do not use the standard endpoint for Code Plan traffic.
dialog.modelIdsHelp: Add model IDs one by one. These become the models configured under this provider.
dialog.fallbackModelIdsHelp: One model ID per line. These models use the current provider config before falling back to other providers.
dialog.noFallbackOptions: Add another provider first to use it as a fallback target.

card.deleteDisabledDefault: Default provider cannot be deleted. Please set another provider as default first
card.deleteConfirmDesc: This will delete "{{name}}" and all its configurations, including API keys. This action cannot be undone.

toast.blockedByFallback: Cannot delete: model(s) {{refs}} from this provider are still referenced in Model Config. Remove those references first.
toast.customProviderIdInvalid: Provider ID can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
toast.minimaxConflict: Cannot add both MiniMax (Global) and MiniMax (CN) providers.

oauth.loginPrompt: This provider requires signing in via your browser.
oauth.browserFlowUnavailable: Browser OAuth is not wired for this provider yet.
oauth.step2: Open the login page in your browser.
oauth.step3: Paste the code to approve access.
oauth.manualMessage: Open the authorization page, complete login, then paste the callback URL or code below.

agentModels.title: Model Config
agentModels.description: Choose which models GeeClaw should use for chat, image generation, video generation, vision understanding, and PDF.
agentModels.fallbackPickerDescription: These models are only used when the primary model is unavailable.
agentModels.emptyState: No provider models are available yet. Add and configure at least one model under Model Providers first.

model.title: Chat Model
model.description: Required for normal chat. If this is empty, GeeClaw can open chat but cannot send messages.
model.fallbackHelp: Fallbacks are used only when the primary chat model is unavailable.

imageModel.title: Vision Understanding Model
imageModel.description: Used for image understanding and multimodal reasoning when GeeClaw needs a dedicated vision understanding model.
imageModel.autoHelp: Automatic mode omits this section and lets OpenClaw fall back to the default chat model chain.
imageModel.fallbackHelp: Fallbacks are attempted after the primary vision understanding model.

pdfModel.title: PDF Model
pdfModel.description: Used for PDF-specific understanding when you want a dedicated model for documents.
pdfModel.autoHelp: Automatic mode omits this section. OpenClaw falls back to the Vision Understanding Model, then to the Chat Model.
pdfModel.fallbackHelp: Fallbacks are attempted after the primary PDF model.

imageGenerationModel.title: Image Generation Model
imageGenerationModel.autoHelp: Automatic mode omits this section and leaves image generation unmanaged.
imageGenerationModel.fallbackHelp: Fallbacks are attempted after the primary image generation model.

videoGenerationModel.title: Video Generation Model
videoGenerationModel.autoHelp: Automatic mode omits this section and leaves video generation unmanaged.
videoGenerationModel.fallbackHelp: Fallbacks are attempted after the primary video generation model.

gateway.title: Gateway

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.description: View all your chats with OpenClaw across multiple IM channels

runtimeSource.label: OpenClaw Runtime
runtimeSource.desc: GeeClaw always runs its bundled OpenClaw runtime and leaves any system OpenClaw installation untouched.
runtimeSource.notDetected: Bundled OpenClaw runtime is not available.

gateway.proxyDesc: Route Electron and Gateway traffic through your local proxy client.
gateway.proxyServerHelp: The default proxy for all requests. Bare host:port values default to HTTP.
gateway.proxyHttpServerHelp: Advanced override for HTTP requests. Leave blank to use Proxy Server.
gateway.proxyHttpsServerHelp: Advanced override for HTTPS requests. Leave blank to use Proxy Server.
gateway.proxyAllServerHelp: Advanced fallback for SOCKS-capable clients and protocols such as Telegram. Leave blank to use Proxy Server.
gateway.proxyBypassHelp: Semicolon, comma, or newline separated hosts that should connect directly.
gateway.proxyRestartNote: Saving reapplies Electron networking and restarts the Gateway immediately.

opencli.title: OpenCLI
opencli.description: Reuse your browser login and turn almost any website into a command line tool your AI can call.

runtime.title: System Runtime
runtime.description: GeeClaw only checks for opencli on your system PATH, including installs completed through CLI Market.
runtime.emptyPath: No opencli command was found on your system PATH

install.title: Install Guide
install.description: opencli is not available on your system PATH yet. Install it from CLI Market first so GeeClaw can continue with doctor checks.

doctor.title: Environment Check
doctor.description: GeeClaw checks whether the OpenCLI background service and Chrome extension are ready to use.

extension.title: Chrome Extension
extension.description: If the extension is not connected yet, download the latest package and install it into Chrome.
extension.step1: 1. Click the button above to download the latest `opencli-extension.zip` package.
extension.step2: 2. Unzip it, then open Chrome and visit chrome://extensions with Developer mode enabled.
extension.step3: 3. Click "Load unpacked" and choose the extracted extension folder.
extension.step4: 4. Come back here and refresh after Chrome shows the OpenCLI extension as enabled.

mcp.title: MCP
mcp.description: Check whether mcporter is installed in the standard way on your system so GeeClaw and other tools can share the same MCP runtime.

health.title: mcporter Health Check
health.description: GeeClaw only checks for mcporter on your system PATH, including installs completed through CLI Market.

system.title: System
system.emptyPath: No mcporter command was found on your system PATH

install.title: Install Guide
install.description: mcporter is not available on your system PATH yet. Install it from CLI Market first so GeeClaw and your terminal can use the same system command.

updates.title: Updates

status.check: Check for updates to get the latest features

updates.help: When auto-update is enabled, updates are downloaded and installed automatically.

dialog.title: GeeClaw {{version}} is ready
dialog.empty: Release notes were not included with this update.

cli.label: Managed OpenClaw CLI
cli.description: Copy a terminal command that runs GeeClaw's bundled OpenClaw with the managed geeclaw profile, without changing your global PATH.
cli.installDescription: Adds a user-level `geeclaw` terminal command for GeeClaw's managed OpenClaw runtime without shadowing system `openclaw`.
cli.installDetail: GeeClaw will add a user-level `geeclaw` command so your terminal can run the bundled managed runtime directly. You may need to open a new terminal window after installation.

transport.label: Gateway Transport Preference
transport.desc: Choose how renderer requests gateway RPC: WebSocket, HTTP proxy, or IPC fallback.

developer.title: Developer
developer.consoleDesc: Access the native OpenClaw management interface
developer.consoleNote: Opens the Control UI with gateway token injected
developer.gatewayTokenDesc: Paste this into Control UI settings if prompted
developer.wsDiagnosticDesc: Temporarily enable WS/HTTP fallback chain for gateway RPC debugging.

about.title: About
about.tagline: I'm not as omnipotent as the world claims, but I'll do my best.
